description: Plugin-distributed hooks for microsoft-graph. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks when the plugin is installed. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the plugin's install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags 4 mechanically-detectable Microsoft Graph anti-patterns in .cs/.ts/.js/.py/.ps1/.http — (1) /beta endpoint shipped to code, (2) hardcoded client secret, (3) broad write-'.All' / Directory.*.All over-privilege, (4) advanced query ($search/$count) missing 'ConsistencyLevel: eventual'. Set MSGRAPH_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
